one_time_description: Fishing quotas (intangible asset - crab, lobster, shrimp) presented on balance sheet contrary to PSAS; if expensed per PSAS, accumulated surplus would be reduced by $4,681,000
economic_notes: Nation has significant commercial fishing operations (shrimp, crab, lobster, sea cucumber), forestry operations including maple syrup and lumber processing, tourism and cultural site interpretation activities, and economic development initiatives. Fishing quota rights (crab, lobster, shrimp) granted by DFO at no monetary consideration with indefinite useful life.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to fishing quotas (intangible asset valued at $4,681,000) presented on the balance sheet contrary to PSAS which requires intangibles to be expensed. Same qualification existed in prior year. Nation has one fully consolidated subsidiary (Organisme de développement économique et communautaire Mic-Mac de Gaspé inc. at 100%). Satellite entities accounted for at cost. Trust fund managed by ISC not included in financial statements (balance $23,793). No budget comparison presented as no formal budget was adopted. Accounts receivable figure of $2,487,213 includes débiteurs $133,255 + sommes à recevoir de gouvernements $1,086,435 + subvention à recevoir SAA $1,267,525. Current liabilities include créditeurs $604,268 + passif au titre des paiements de transfert $1,100,973. DEC capital transfer of $750,000 appears in 2023 sectoral data but not in main income statement revenue lines - likely a reclassification within 'autres subventions'. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all identified government transfers including autres subventions treated as government transfers.
